data.title: Niu Technologies Q1 Sales Volume Surge 57% On Solid China Demand
data.description: Chinese EV maker Niu Technologies sold over 203,000 units in Q1 2025, fueled by a 66% domestic sales surge. Its new NX Pro scooter launch attracted 3.5 million viewers and significant pre-orders.

data.title: BP Begins Hunt for New Chair As Elliott Management Pushes for Changes
data.description: BP's board begins search for new Chair following Helge Lund's decision to step down, amid pressure from activist hedge fund Elliot Management.
